description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house set within a forested landscape, surrounded by dense pine trees and bordered by a rocky shoreline and a sandy area. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of gray stone and white exterior finishes. A wooden deck with a hot tub and a fenced pool area are visible at the rear, providing outdoor leisure spaces. The property is enclosed by a perimeter of trees, offering privacy and a natural aesthetic. The front of the house faces a rocky water feature, while the back opens to a sandy expanse. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor areas, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, gray stone and white finishes, surrounded by pine trees, a rocky shoreline, and outdoor leisure spaces including a deck and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the house partially obscured by pine trees, with a rocky shoreline and water feature in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, dense tree coverage, and the sandy area extending along one side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced pool, wooden deck with hot tub, and the house's large windows and open backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sandy expanse, more pine trees, and the integration of the house with the natural landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is partially obscured by trees, features a simple door with minimal steps and no porch, blending into the modern facade.
